CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Attorney, Laralei S. Paras of the Chanler Group (510) 848- 8880, appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Frederick W. Kosmo, Jr. of Wilson Turner Kosmo (619) 236-9600 appears as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with Proposition 65 settlement requirements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
